findings.description: Missing AGENTS.md and opencode adapter when adding sw-sync. Fixed after review. sw-review avoided by applying lesson.
findings.proposedRule: P26: Wire all 5 documentation surfaces when adding a new skill

findings.description: Stale RED-phase comments, orphaned markdown list items, GNU-only \s in grep. Tests catch content but miss structure.
findings.proposedRule: P27: Test for markdown structure, not just content keywords

findings.description: Stage boundary violation caught at design, saving a build cycle. Enriched handoff was simpler alternative.
findings.proposedRule: P28: Challenge stage boundary violations at design time, not build time

findings.description: Two-step verify→resolve solved by information flow (enriched handoff) not a new tool (/sw-fix).
findings.proposedRule: P29: Prefer context-flow improvements over new tools
